name: hero-modern
title: Hero Modern
description: Hero moderno con acciones y preview.

import { ArrowRight } from "lucide-react" import type { ReactNode } from "react" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { LiquidGlass } from "@/components/ui/liquid-glass" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" export function HeroModern({ title, description, primaryAction, secondaryAction, preview, className, }: { title: string description: string primaryAction: ReactNode secondaryAction?: ReactNode preview?: ReactNode className?: string }) { return (

{title}

{description}

{secondaryAction ? : null}
{preview ?? (
)}
) }
